queue.title: Refactor repo into monorepo skeleton while preserving existing website behavior
queue.notes: Verified. Existing website source bytes and local HTTP behavior were preserved.

queue.title: Import V1 data-lake code, SQL, docs, and tests into monorepo boundaries
queue.notes: Verified. V1 data-lake app, SQL, docs, and tests were imported into monorepo boundaries with monorepo path updates and credential-path hardening only.

queue.title: Implement batch runner with run ID, 45-minute DynamoDB TTL lock, status output, sanitized durable logs, and safe manual command
queue.notes: Verified. Local batch runner foundation writes run IDs, 45-minute TTL lock metadata, immutable status files, sanitized logs, and safe manual dry-run output. Execute mode deliberately fails until production extraction orchestration lands.

queue.title: Add production raw refresh orchestration using the existing GET-only extractor and full core-source refresh strategy
expectedEvidence: manual local orchestration run against controlled output paths
queue.notes: Verified. Execute-mode raw refresh orchestration is wired through the batch runner, locally verified with a fake GET-only client and controlled output paths. No live GHL extraction or AWS resource changes were run.

queue.title: Add idempotent recording archival skip logic keyed by stable GHL call message ID
expectedEvidence: bounded static review for no recording URL exposure
queue.notes: Verified. Recording archive keys are stable by message ID and existing archived recordings are skipped before download. No live recording downloads were run.

queue.title: Add run-safe curated publishing, latest-success freshness semantics, immutable run-status files, and lightweight stage-history snapshot/diff support
queue.notes: Verified. Curated output now uses snapshot_date/run_id partition semantics, rows carry snapshot_at, latest-success payload is produced only after writes, and opportunity_stage_history captures lightweight stage/status snapshots.

queue.title: Add container packaging, ECR image tagging, ECS Fargate task definition, IAM, public-subnet/no-NAT networking, and EventBridge Scheduler at 30-minute cadence
queue.notes: Partial implementation committed. Terraform fmt and validate pass, but Docker build verification is blocked because Docker is not installed on this machine. No AWS resources were created or modified.

queue.notes: Do not post routine Slack messages from JKS; deployed runtime alerting only.
